description_long: This sculpture depicts a highly stylized human figure with elongated limbs and a simplified, abstract form. The figure stands upright with one arm bent and resting on its hip, while the other arm extends outward, creating a dynamic, asymmetrical pose. The head is oval and featureless, lacking facial details, and the body tapers down to a narrow base, suggesting a minimalist approach. The surface appears weathered and patinated, with a greenish hue typical of aged bronze or copper alloys. The overall form is slender and elegant, with a sense of movement captured in the posture. The sculpture's abstract style suggests it could be a modern or ancient artistic representation of the human form.
description: An abstract, elongated human figure sculpture with one arm on its hip and the other extended outward, featuring a weathered greenish surface and minimalist details.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the figure's arm bent at the hip and the other arm extended outward, with the full body and head visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the sculpture and the forward projection of the extended arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back curvature, the arm positions, and the narrow base of the figure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the slender profile and the backward sweep of the bent arm.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
